best_evidence: analysis, reporting, dashboards, or decision-support artifacts
workflow/process improvement with measurable efficiency gains
implementation, testing, release, or launch readiness work
key_metrics: number of reports or dashboards delivered
number of stakeholders or teams supported
resume_strategy: Lead with BA-style bullets that translate ambiguous needs into clear requirements and execution plans.
Show data analysis as decision support, not just reporting.
Frame operational work around measurable workflow improvement.
Use product-operations language: roadmap, delivery cadence, launches, adoption, and feedback loops.
jd_profile.raw_text:
About the job
Overview

 Do not apply if you are not local to either Vienna VA or Pensacola FL. No third party applicants.**

BRMi is seeking a Portfolio Tooling & AI Enablement Analyst to support a large financial Enterprise in either Vienna, VA or Pensacola, FL.

Goal: Improve how Lending work gets done by connecting tools, data, and workflows across

the portfolio. This role focuses on making ServiceNow, Azure DevOps, and Power BI work together

to support intake, execution, and decision-making, while introducing practical AI

solutions that simplify work and accelerate delivery. Success equates to simpler workflows, better visibility, and strong tool adoption across

teams.

Benefits

 Comprehensive Medical, Dental, and Vision Insurance
 Employer-Paid Life Insurance
 Employer-Paid Short-Term and Long-Term Disability Insurance
 401(k)
 Paid Time Off (PTO) that includes Vacation Leave, Sick Leave, and 11 Paid Holidays
 Educational Assistance

NYBRID in either Vienna, VA or Pensacola, FL 3 days per week.

Salary

Vienna VA: $130-$140K

Pensacola FL: $118K-128K

Click here to learn about BRMi's culture.

Click here to see BRMi’s Glassdoor reviews

Responsibilities

 Tool Integration & Flow
 Connect ServiceNow, Azure DevOps, and Power BI
 Enable end-to-end visibility from intake to delivery
 Reduce duplication and manual effort
 Create a single view of portfolio work
 Portfolio Ways of Working, Governance & AI
 Align tools to support prioritization, sequencing, and delivery governance
 Improve visibility into dependencies, risks, and progress
 Embed agile workflows through consistent tool usage
 Introduce AI into intake, reporting, and planning to improve decisions
 AI, Automation & Tool Optimization
 Deliver simple, high-value solutions such as copilots for intake, reporting, and

analysis

 Implement automated workflows or agents
 Enable AI-driven insights and dashboards
 Improve tools to support planning, roadmaps, and execution tracking
 Enablement & Adoption
 Drive team adoption of tools and AI
 Provide training, templates, and job aids
 Coach teams on applying tools in real scenarios
 Increase consistency and self-service usage
 Stakeholder Partnership
 Partner across Product, PMO, and Technology
 Communicate clear, practical solutions
 Continuously improve based on feedback

Qualifications

 Experience with Azure DevOps, ServiceNow, Power BI, or similar tools
 Experience improving workflow from intake to delivery
 Hands-on experience with tool configuration, automation, or AI tools
 Strong enablement, communication, and simplification skills
 Experience in cross-functional environments

Preferred Qualifications / Certifications

 Agile / Lean certifications (e.g., SAFe, Lean Portfolio Management, PMP)
 Agile / Lean certifications (SAFe, LPM, PMP)
 Experience with Power BI or similar reporting/visualization tools
 Power BI or similar visualization tools
 Experience with low-code / no-code platforms or workflow automation tools
 Low-code / no-code automation experience
 Foundational AI certifications (e.g., Microsoft Azure AI Fundamentals or similar)
 AI certifications (e.g., Azure AI Fundamentals)
 Experience building or experimenting with AI agents, copilots, or automation

frameworks

 Experience building copilots, agents, or automation solutions
 Experience in change management, training, or capability development
 Background in change management or capability development
 BRMi will not sponsor applicants for work visas for this position.**
This is a W2 opportunity only**

EOE/Minorities/Females/Vet/Disabled 

We are an equal opportunity employer that values diversity and commitment at all levels. All individuals, regardless of personal characteristics, are encouraged to apply. Employment policies and decisions on employment and promotion are based on merit, qualifications, performance, and business needs. The decisions and criteria governing the employment relationship with all employees are made in a nondiscriminatory manner, without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, age, marital status, physical or mental disability, medical condition, veteran status, or any other factor determined to be unlawful by federal, state, or local statutes.
